title: Default value 0 persists on number fields in datatable
symptom: When using the datatable node to update rows, number fields default to 0. Deleting the 0 does not persist after refreshing the page.
not_this_if: Workflow is saved properly before refresh
root_cause: The issue arises when the workflow is not saved correctly, leading to default values being reapplied upon refresh. This can happen if no changes are made to trigger the auto-save feature.
fix_steps: Make a small change to the workflow, such as moving the datatable node
Refresh the page to verify the changes persist
agent_instruction: Make a small adjustment to the workflow to trigger auto-save and ensure the changes are saved.
